name: BLT Garden Pita
recipeIngredient: 12 slices of Oscar Mayer Bacon, cooked and cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except pita breads and dressing in a large bowl.
2. Cut the top 1/3 off each pita bread.
3. Spread 1 tablespoon of dressing inside the pocket of each pita bread.
4. Fill each pocket with 1/6 of the mixture.
5. Makes 6 servings.
